notes: Game runs excellent out of the box - it just does not like alt-tabbing. Every time i alt+tab out of it (or another program forces a minimization) the screen turns black. Game still runs (you can hear the sounds), but all you will see is a black  screen with your cursor... well you could still try to finish your mission blind.
title: Warhammer 40,000: Inquisitor - Martyr

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 with Max-Q Design
notes: As people has reported, there is a problem with getting a black screen after alt-tabbing. But this can be fixed by changing to window-borderless mode and alt-tabbing works perfectly fine.
title: Warhammer 40,000: Inquisitor - Martyr

notes:
Game is installed on an SSD.

Only issue was with Alt+Tabbing; i can hear sounds and see cursor but screen is black. I changed the Full-screen Windowed option in-game, but the game loaded with a black screen and cursor only.

FIX: Used -sw for launch options and game runs great - even when I Alt+Tab!
title: Warhammer 40,000: Inquisitor - Martyr
